message: Create a file named hello.txt in the current directory containing exactly the text: Hello
Create a file named config.json in the current directory containing a JSON object with two keys: "name" set to the string "credence", and "version" set to the number 1.
Create a file named notes.md in the current directory. It must contain a level-1 markdown heading reading '# Notes' on the first line, then a bullet line reading '- first item'.
Create a file named grocery.txt in the current directory with exactly three lines, one item per line, in this order: apples, then bananas, then cherries.

Write a Python script named fizzbuzz.py in the current directory that prints the numbers 1 to 15 inclusive, one per line, except: print 'Fizz' instead of any multiple of 3, 'Buzz' instead of any multiple of 5, and 'FizzBuzz' instead of any multiple of both 3 and 5.
Write a Python script named sum.py in the current directory that computes and prints (on its own line) the sum of all integers from 1 to 100 inclusive.
